about.description: Skiff is a local cross-platform disk cleanup tool for Linux, macOS, and Windows. It checks caches, applications, duplicates, and large files so you can review paths, sizes, and risk before deleting.
agent.confirm: Selected Agent session bodies, thread records, logs, target records, and indexes will be deleted.
agent.empty.description: Agent sessions stored on this machine will appear after scanning.
agent.empty.title: No Agent sessions
agent.failed: Some Agent sessions failed to clean.
agent.searchPlaceholder: Search source, title, directory, or session ID
agent.subtitle: Scan local Agent sessions, filter by source, and precisely delete session records, logs, and indexes.
agent.title: Agent sessions
apps.empty.description: Recognized packages on this system will appear after scanning.
apps.empty.title: No app packages
apps.permission.usuallyNoAdmin: Usually does not require administrator permission
apps.platform.linux.description: Scan installed APT, RPM, and Flatpak applications, then call the system package manager after confirmation.
apps.platform.macos.description: Scan .app bundles, Homebrew formulae, and casks, then move to Trash or call brew uninstall after confirmation.
apps.platform.macos.privilege: system applications may require administrator authorization.
apps.platform.macos.scanning: Reading macOS applications and Homebrew lists
apps.platform.windows.description: Scan Windows Uninstall registry entries, then call each application's official uninstall command after confirmation.
apps.platform.windows.privilege: system-level applications may require administrator authorization.
apps.searchPlaceholder: Search package name, app name, or description
apps.title: App packages
duplicates.activity.scanning: Finding duplicates by size and content hash
duplicates.subtitle: Find duplicates by file size and content hash. The first file in each group is kept by default.
empty.file.description: Files matching the criteria will appear after scanning.
empty.file.title: No results
empty.scan.description: Click the scan button in the toolbar to read the current user's cache directories.
history.empty.description: Results appear after a cleanup finishes.
history.empty.title: No records
history.header.subtitle: Result of the most recent cleanup or delete operation
history.header.title: Cleanup history
inspector.noTarget: Select an item after scanning to review paths and impact.
inspector.title: Item details
large.activity.scanning: Scanning large files in the user directory
large.subtitle: Scan large files in the user directory and confirm before deleting.
overview.category.subtitle.ready: Review reclaimable space and selection by category
overview.category.title: Cleanup suggestions
overview.hero.caption.cleanable: {count} cleanable items, low-risk items selected by default.
overview.hero.caption.empty: The most recent scan found no reclaimable space. You can scan again later.
overview.hero.caption.initial: Scan system caches, browser caches, and developer tool caches, then confirm before deleting.
settings.closeToTray.description: When enabled, the close button hides the window. When disabled, the close button exits the app.
settings.closeToTray.title: Minimize to tray on close
settings.duplicate.description: Duplicate file scanning ignores files smaller than this size.
settings.duplicate.title: Duplicate file threshold
settings.language.description: Choose the language used by the main window and tray menu.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.large.description: Large file scanning only returns files at least this size.
settings.large.title: Large file threshold
settings.subtitle: Adjust large-file and duplicate-file thresholds and interface language.
systemStatus.title: System status
table.name: Name
targetList.title: Cleanup items
view.about.description: Learn Skiff's scope and safety boundaries
view.agent.description: Check local Agent sessions and run record storage
view.developer.description: Review installed packages and uninstall after confirmation
view.duplicates.description: Identify duplicate files by content and keep necessary copies
view.history.description: Review the most recent cleanup or delete result
view.largeFiles.description: Find large files and confirm each deletion
view.overview.description: Central view for disk status, cleanup results, and recent actions
view.settings.description: Adjust scan thresholds and cleanup preferences
